overview.description: SiddalaKona is located in Sydapuram mandal, Nellore district of the Indian state of Andhra Pradesh. It is located near It is a Jain Heritage site, cave and temple, built on a rock.

topPlaces.name: Sydapuram
topPlaces.description: Sydapuram or Saidapuram is a village and mandal headquarters of Sydapuram mandal located in Nellore district, Andhra Pradesh, India.

topPlaces.name: Chaganam Rajupalem
topPlaces.description: Chaganam Rajupalem is a village panchayath located in the Sydapuram Mandal, Nellore district of Andhra Pradesh state, India.

topPlaces.name: Thippavarappadu
topPlaces.description: Thippavarappadu is a large village located in Gudur mandal of Sri Potti Sriramulu Nellore district, Andhra Pradesh with total 706 families residing.

topPlaces.name: Mittatmakur
topPlaces.description: Mittatmakur is a village (with a gram panchayat) located at a distance of around 14 kilometers from Gudur, Nellore District, Andhra Pradesh. The village comes under Gudur constituency.

items.note: Sydapuram or Saidapuram is a village and mandal headquarters of Sydapuram mandal located in Nellore district, Andhra Pradesh, India.
Chaganam Rajupalem is a village panchayath located in the Sydapuram Mandal, Nellore district of Andhra Pradesh state, India.
Thippavarappadu is a large village located in Gudur mandal of Sri Potti Sriramulu Nellore district, Andhra Pradesh with total 706 families residing.
Mittatmakur is a village (with a gram panchayat) located at a distance of around 14 kilometers from Gudur, Nellore District, Andhra Pradesh. The village comes under Gudur constituency.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit SiddalaKona?
faq.a: The best time to visit SiddalaKona is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

The nearest airport is Tirupati Airport (67 km) and the nearest railway station is Tirupati Railway Station (72 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for SiddalaKona?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of SiddalaKona at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in SiddalaKona?
faq.a: Stays in SiddalaKona start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in SiddalaKona?
faq.a: The top attractions are Sydapuram, Chaganam Rajupalem, Thippavarappadu, Mittatmakur.
